title: BBAI Stock Steadies As Earnings Beat And Defense Wins Fuel Outlook
text: BigBear.ai Inc. (NYSE: BBAI) gained 3.2% on May 11, 2026, following stronger-than-expected quarterly results and significant government contract wins. The company reported Q1 earnings that exceeded expectations. Revenue reached $34.4 million, surpassing the consensus estimate of $33.6 million. The per-share loss narrowed to -$0.12, compared to -$0.25 a year earlier, indicating improving financial trajectory. BigBear.ai secured approximately $75 million in new contract wins across national security and trade & travel sectors during the quarter. BigBear.ai operates as a small-cap AI-for-defense software provider, targeting a specialized government and infrastructure market. The company guides for approximately 17% revenue growth through 2026. The stock demonstrated disciplined consolidation, trading within a tight $4.25-$4.42 range intraday before closing near $4.32. Despite ongoing losses, traders view the strengthening contract pipeline and defense-sector positioning as catalysts for potential momentum plays.
